changes.comment: evm/fallback: EvmPortalDataSourceBuilder and EvmRpcDataSourceBuilder are now full standalone data-source builders (fluent setFields/addLog/… + build()), sharing the query surface with EvmFallbackDataSourceBuilder. Used in a fallback they take connection config only; the fallback injects its shared query, and a source that also sets its own query throws at build() time.
